title: The Wilde Girls
overview: In the year 1932, in the heart of the great depression, two clueless socialite heiresses with zero survival skills are tricked into moving to Washington State from millionaire's row Manhattan. After accidentally killing a hit man sent after them, they find themselves lost in the wilderness with a price on their heads. An unenthusiastic alliance with a misanthropic mountain man with a dark past may be their only chance for survival.
